name: Crockpot Split Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Ham bone (with some meat left on) or 2 Ham hocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the slow-cooking pot.
2. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 to 10 hours.
3. Remove the ham bone; cut the meat off and dice it, then return the meat to the soup.
